summary: Both teams have evenly matched starters with unknown handedness advantages. The bullpens and lineups show no significant trends that favor one side over the other.

detect: The matchup features two unknown handedness pitchers.

decide.resolve: Hold this read with caution until more information is available.
decide.justify: Confidence is low due to the uncertainty surrounding the starters.
